response.overview: In many cultures, witchcraft was synonymous with healing and deep communion with nature and community, while in others, it was feared as a malevolent force. This documentary focuses on the spiritual and positive magic that goes back to biblical times. Witchcraft is about connecting with nature, embracing your individuality, and fostering a sense of community while pursuing an enriching and transformative experience.
response.title: Witchcraft: A Beginners Guide
